# harness_fme_segment_environment_association (Resource)

Activate a Split segment in an environment (create) or remove activation (destroy). Import id format: `org_id/project_id/environment_id/segment_name`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_id` (String) Split environment ID.
- `org_id` (String) Harness organization identifier.
- `project_id` (String) Harness project identifier.
- `segment_name` (String) Classic segment name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
